title: Product Development Scientist
description:
Mirxes is a Singapore-headquartered molecular diagnostic company with R&D, manufacturing, and clinical lab operations in Singapore, USA, Japan, and China. We specialize in microRNA technologies and the development, manufacturing, and provision of diagnostic test kits and clinical services. Our mission is to enable early disease detection and provide insights for better patient care by harnessing the power of microRNA to augment traditional testing. Our vision is to be the world’s leading developer and provider of accurate, actionable, and affordable microRNA-powered diagnostic tests.


Job Location:  Helios (Onsite)


Job Summary

We are seeking a highly motivated Product Development Scientist to drive innovation and develop new products from concept through commercialization. In this role, you will design experiments, analyze data and translate scientific insights into high-quality products that meet customer and business needs. This role offers the unique opportunity to collaborate cross-functionally to guide project direction and design.

Roles and Responsibilities

  • Lead the research, formulation, and development of new products and technologies.
  • Design and execute laboratory experiments, following sound scientific and statistical methods.
  • Evaluate product performance through analytical testing, stability studies, and prototype iterations.
  • Collaborate with cross-functional teams (Clinical, Assay Development, Data Science and Bioinformatics, Quality, Manufacturing, Commercial, Regulatory) to define requirements and ensure successful scale-up.
  • Maintain detailed documentation, including lab notebooks, test plans, and technical reports.
  • Analyze data to draw conclusions and guide decision-making; present findings to stakeholders.
  • Support intellectual property efforts, including literature reviews and patent disclosures.
  • Troubleshoot product and process issues, identifying root causes and proposing solutions.
  • Stay current with scientific advancements, competitive products, and emerging technologies.

Desired Skills and Competencies

Required

  • At least BSc in molecular biology or related discipline.
  • 2–5+ years of relevant experience in product development or applied R&D (or strong academic research experience).
  • Hands-on laboratory skills and familiarity with experimental design and data analysis, particularly in DNA/RNA-based diagnostic assays (quantitative real-time PCR, multiplex-PCR), NGS and circulating nucleic acid analysis.
  • Experience with software as medical device (SaMD) preferred.
  • Strong problem-solving ability and a track record of scientific creativity.
  • Must be able to work independently and is self-motivated.
  • Excellent communication skills and the ability to work in cross-functional teams.
  • Experience managing multiple projects and meeting deadlines.
  • Ability to work and collaborate effectively in a dynamic environment with a team of diverse disciplines.

Preferred 

  • Experience taking products from concept to commercialization. 
  • Knowledge of regulatory requirements relevant to the industry such as ISO13485.
  • Proficiency with analytical instrumentation, formulation tools and statistical software.
  • Prior patent or publication experience.

This position is based in Singapore.

We appreciate your interest in the above-mentioned position, however, only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

postedCompany.description:
Be part of the team delivering world-leading multi-cancer early detection. MiRXES is a Singapore-headquartered biotechnology company that translates research discoveries to deliver world-leading multi-cancer early detection. We are Asia-centered, starting with Southeast Asia, and have global ambitions. We have research, development, manufacturing, and clinical diagnostic operations in Singapore, USA, Japan, and China.


Our versatile platform technology and capabilities have broad applications in the discovery of biomarkers and diagnosis of diseases. We started with cancer, but are also addressing unmet clinical needs in cardiovascular, metabolic, and infectious diseases.
postedCompany.name: MIRXES LAB PTE. LTD.
